name: Prime Impact Acquisition I
business: Prime Impact Acquisition I is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has no operating revenues and focuses on acquisition opportunities that capitalize on the growth of the data-centric economy, targeting companies in the TMT, Med Tech, and Industrial Tech sectors. The company has entered into a business combination agreement with Cheche Technology, Inc., which is expected to close in the second or third quarter of 2023.

exposures.sentence: We believe that advances in Artificial Intelligence (AI), machine learning, cloud computing, mobile applications, automation throughout global supply chains, clean energy solutions, autonomous vehicles and the consumer and industrial IoT will drive sustained growth and accelerate the digital transformation of the enterprise and lead to significant value creation.

tamClaims.claim: The annual volume of data created worldwide from mobile devices, cloud computing, Internet of Things (IoT) devices and a host of other sources is expected to grow at a compound annual rate of over 28% from 2019 to 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: According to an industry source, the annual volume of data created worldwide from mobile devices, cloud computing, Internet of Things (IoT) devices and a host of other sources is expected to grow at a compound annual rate of over 28% from 2019 to 2025.

tamClaims.claim: By 2025, digitization and the adoption of new technologies that leverage the resulting data sets could add up to $33 trillion in economic impact globally.
tamClaims.sentence: According to an industry source, by 2025, digitization and the adoption of new technologies that leverage the resulting data sets could add up to $33 trillion in economic impact globally.
